style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;rounded=0;fontSize=14;" value="<div>To initiate an upload, an Authorized User or Watchdog Service will need to:</div><div><br></div><div>1. Register their acquisition and instrument to the Biodata Registry via the metadata service API.</div><div><br></div><div>2. Move their data asset to VAST</div><div><br></div><div>3. Register the data asset to the Biodata Registry.<br></div><div><br></div><div>4. Send a compress and upload request to allen-data‑transfer-service. The transfer service will need the Acquisition ID, desired S3 bucket, and a job_type per modality.</div><div><br></div><div>The transfer service will:</div><div>- Check file structure<br></div><div>- Compress the data</div><div>- Add processing metadata to the Biodata Registry</div><div>- Upload the data to S3</div><div>- Update Biodata Registry Data Asset with the S3 location</div><div>- Trigger Code Ocean pipelines </div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="630" width="260" x="900" y="-720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="XjCrOu-fNeJbmDTpR4Ur-1" parent="SpeKbif7ejOxNLxw_tv2-1" div.div: To initiate an upload, an Authorized User or Watchdog Service will need to:
1. Register their acquisition and instrument to the Biodata Registry via the metadata service API.
2. Move their data asset to VAST
3. Register the data asset to the Biodata Registry.
4. Send a compress and upload request to allen-data‑transfer-service. The transfer service will need the Acquisition ID, desired S3 bucket, and a job_type per modality.
- Add processing metadata to the Biodata Registry
- Update Biodata Registry Data Asset with the S3 location
